ddls:
CREATE TABLE "streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data stream */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination address for the stream */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event type associated with the stream */,
  "mti" TEXT /* Message type identifier (MTI) */,
  "data_content" TEXT /* Data content description */,
  "stream_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the stream */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the stream */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the stream */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the stream is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streams_stream_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_type_id") REFERENCES stream_types ("stream_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_messages" (
  "msg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control message */,
  "msg_type" TEXT /* Type of control message (ping, pong, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control message */,
  "is_ack_required" INTEGER /* Whether acknowledgement is required for this control message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("msg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer record */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated stream */,
  "bytes_transferred" INTEGER /* Number of bytes transferred in this event */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_time" TEXT /* Time of the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transfers_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of what the flag indicates */,
  "flag_value" INTEGER /* Value of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payloads" (
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payload */,
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data transfer */,
  "payload_content" TEXT /* Content of the payload */,
  "payload_size" INTEGER /* Size of the payload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payloads_transfer_id FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_id") REFERENCES data_transfers ("transfer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streams_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated stream */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the stream */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streams_status_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Error code for the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream */,
  "notify_on_error" INTEGER /* Whether to notify on errors */,
  "notify_on_status_change" INTEGER /* Whether to notify on status changes */,
  "notify_via_email" INTEGER /* Whether to notify via email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stream_types" (
  "stream_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream type */,
  "stream_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the stream type (e.g., Real-Time, Batch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stream type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stream_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated stream */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the stream in milliseconds */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of the stream in bytes per second */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "average_latency" REAL /* Average latency of the stream over a given time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stream_metrics_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stream_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated stream */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken on the stream (e.g., started, stopped) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stream_history_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
